description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job called linux that runs in the default test stage using the runner's default Docker image. In this job execute the following shell commands in order: curl -L -o dvm https://github.com/jacob-carlborg/dvm/releases/download/v0.4.4/dvm-0.4.4-linux-debian7-x86_64, chmod +x dvm, ./dvm install dvm, source ~/.bashrc, dvm install 2.071.1, dvm use 2.071.1 -d, curl -o dub.tar.gz 'http://code.dlang.org/files/dub-1.0.0-linux-x86_64.tar.gz', tar -xzf dub.tar.gz, and ./dub test. The job has no caches, artifacts, or special rules, so it runs on every pipeline execution.
